untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition of: (1) consolidation base identification and counting (4th base vs 3rd), (2) breakout above upper band of specific base by >2%, (3) reversal back below midpoint within 5 bars, (4) breakdown toward lower 25% of prior base range. These multi-bar pattern sequences and relative base zone positioning cannot be expressed using only point-in-time technical indicators and simple operators. The signal requires state tracking across multiple consolidation cycles and relative positioning within custom-defined support/resistance zones derived from recent price history patterns.
translation_notes: Core market-top signal (close < sma_20) and volume confirmation (volume > vol_ratio_20) are translatable, but the sophisticated multi-consolidation pattern logic, failed breakout mechanics, and zone-relative breakdowns require custom pattern detection beyond available indicator set. This is a complex multi-bar swing pattern unsuitable for simple rule-based translation.
